title: Clothes
writer: Avery Hopwood, Channing Pollock, Arthur J. Zellner
actors: Olive Tell, Crauford Kent, Cyril Chadwick
plot: Olivia Sherwood, mistakenly believing that she has inherited a large estate from her father, spends money wantonly. In reality, her funds are supplied by unscrupulous attorney Arnold West, whose ulterior motive is to possess Olivi...
